title: True Vanilla
description: A chill vanilla-style High Performance Shader with tweakable fog, colors, and fun filters. Looks clean, runs light.
body:
# True Vanilla

Minecraft already looks good. True Vanilla just makes it look a little better without going crazy about it.

No lens flares. No fake sun rays. No stuff your PC can't handle. Just clean fog, smooth colors, and a few fun filters you can actually toggle in the menu. (Basically Adds just Fog and some fun settings)


![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3462bad70a7ea12b31c39d547f13e65b14c40ecb.png)


## What's in it
-  Adjustable retro fog — push it close for that cozy old-school feel or stretch it out wide
-  Brightness, contrast, and color saturation sliders
-  Grayscale filter for that black and white cinematic look
-  Photo-negative invert filter
-  Night vision green tint mode
-  Super lightweight — works great on low-end PCs

Everything is tweakable straight from the Iris shader settings menu. No config files, no hassle.

## Requirements
- Iris Shaders
- Minecraft 1.21.x or 26.x

*Vanilla but make it just a tiny bit fancier.*
